## Checklist

- [ ] TypeScript `strict: true` — no `any`
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes with no errors
- [ ] At least 2 unit tests pass (`npm test`)
- [ ] `.env.example` committed (no real keys)
- [ ] File type and size validated in backend
- [ ] Loading, error, and success states in UI
- [ ] README explains setup and design decisions
